introSection: Steam Coaster Iron Bull (Japanese: スチームコースター アイアンブル) is a steel enclosed roller coaster currently located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie, Japan.

fullText:
Steam Coaster Iron Bull (Japanese: スチームコースター アイアンブル) is a steel enclosed roller coaster currently located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie, Japan.



Black track and supports.




 * Steam Coaster Iron Bull on the parks website (In Japanese)
